# discord_user (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord user by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_user" "alice" {
  user_id = "345678901234567890"
}

output "alice_username" {
  value = data.discord_user.alice.username
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the user.

### Read-Only

- `avatar_hash` (String) Avatar hash.
- `bot` (Boolean) Whether the user is a bot.
- `discriminator` (String) Legacy four-digit discriminator.
- `global_name` (String) Account display (global) name.
- `username` (String) Account username.
